creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Can you please send an updated patch? Seems like you are running an old CVS
ports repository or maybe not. As my update was committed on 18th instant.

Regards,
Muhammad

On Mon, Mar 19, 2012 at 8:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of shells/ch,
>
> Please note that PR ports/166232 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166232
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
